data.title: Tesonet Global Targets to Increase its Interest in Artea Bankas
data.description: On March 12, 2026, Artea Bankas, AB received notice from Tesonet Global, UAB regarding the intention to raise its ownership share in the Bank to a maximum of 31.68%, which includes the current stake held by Tesonet Global. Tesonet Global has initiated transactions to achieve this target.

data.title: Barte Selects Oscilar’s AI-Native Risk Decisioning Platform to Transform Fraud and Compliance Operations
data.description: A collaboration between Brazilian financial platform Barte and technology companies Oscilar and Mastercard risk intelligence is set to drive the next phase of growth for Barte. This partnership aims to leverage advanced AI technology to enhance the platform's capabilities. With this move, Barte seeks to expand its reach and improve its services using cutting-edge risk intelligence solutions. This strategic alliance is geared towards propelling Barte's expansion efforts, indicating a significant development in the financial technology sector.

data.title: Endometriosis Market Expected to Achieve Significant CAGR During the Forecast Period (2026-2036) Driven by Innovative Treatment Options | DelveInsight
data.description: Over the period from 2026 to 2036, the endometriosis market is projected to experience continuous growth. This growth is anticipated to be fueled by increasing awareness of the disease, improving rates of diagnosis, and advancements in noninvasive diagnostic methods. Additionally, the market is expected to benefit from the introduction of new therapeutic options like HMI-115.

data.title: Colorado State University Global and Denver Public Schools Partner to Provide Guaranteed Admission for High School Students
data.description: In a recent announcement made on March 12, 2026, Colorado State University Global (CSU Global) and Denver Public Schools (DPS) have joined forces to offer guaranteed admission to CSU Global undergraduate programs and discounted tuition rates for DPS students. This collaboration is set to benefit a significant number of students in the DPS district, providing them with greater access to higher education opportunities. The partnership aims to facilitate easier pathways for DPS students to pursue further education and enhance their academic and professional prospects.

data.title: InventHelp Inventor Develops Protective Accessory for Ratchet Straps (SBT-2225)
data.description: On March 12, 2026, in Pittsburgh, an inventor from Phelan, California, shared their inspiration behind creating the Ratchet Strap Bag. The inventor aimed to offer truckers a straightforward way to secure and stabilize the loose tail ends of tightened ratchet straps. The innovative product addresses this issue effectively, providing a practical solution for ensuring the safe transportation of goods.

data.title: Delta Faucet Named to USA TODAY's Most Trusted Brands 2026
data.description: Delta Faucet, a prominent player in the kitchen and bath industry, was recently acknowledged for its brand trustworthiness and strong consumer confidence. The company has been named as one of the most trusted brands in America. This recognition came from USA TODAY and highlights the high level of trust that consumers have in Delta Faucet. The news was announced on March 12, 2026, and underlines the company's reputation and standing in the industry. This recognition is a testament to the trust and confidence that consumers have in Delta Faucet.

data.title: New Survey Finds 53% of Americans Would Give Up Everyday Expenses to Pay for Cosmetic Treatments
data.description: In celebration of LaserAway's 20th anniversary, a study was conducted to explore changing attitudes among Americans towards beauty spending, trust, and normalization. The survey, commissioned by LaserAway, a top player in aesthetic dermatology nationwide, revealed significant insights. Key highlights include the shifts in beauty expenditure patterns and the evolving perceptions of trust and normalization among consumers. This survey, undertaken during LaserAway's milestone 20th year, provides valuable findings regarding the changing dynamics in the beauty industry.

data.title: Study Shows Habit-Formation App Improves Long-Term Weight Loss In National Diabetes Prevention Program

The platform has showcased superior effectiveness compared to the gold-standard behavior change program. This development highlights Fresh Tri's leading position in utilizing neuroscience to drive impactful results in weight management.

data.title: WTWH Healthcare Announces the Frontline Honors Awards Class of 2025
data.description: On March 12, 2026, in Cleveland, WTWH Healthcare, a division of WTWH Media, LLC, revealed the Frontline Honors Class of 2025. This year's honorees span various sectors including behavioral health, home health & home care, hospice & palliative care, memory care, senior housing & senior living. The recognition celebrates individuals who have showcased exceptional dedication and commitment to their respective fields. The awards highlight a diverse group of professionals contributing significantly to the healthcare industry.

data.title: Ulta Beauty Likely To Report Lower Q4 Earnings; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: Ulta Beauty, Inc. is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings after the market closes on Thursday, March 12. Analysts predict earnings of $8.03 per share, a decrease from $8.46 per share in the same period last year. The consensus estimate for quarterly revenue stands at $3.82 billion, up from $3.49 billion a year ago. Ulta Beauty recently opened its first store in the United Arab Emirates at Mall of the Emirates on Jan. 29, in collaboration with Alshaya Group. On Wednesday, Ulta Beauty's shares grew by 0.8% to close at $652.65. For more information and analyst ratings, visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga's website.

data.title: Flam Onboards Ben Feld of Niantic Labs to Scale Interactive Advertising
data.description: A tech startup, Flam, based in San Francisco, has recently hired Ben Feld as their new Sales Lead. With over 15 years of experience, Feld has a background representing immersive technology platforms at major global events such as Cannes Lions, SXSW, and VivaTech. He has closely collaborated with various brands to navigate future digital engagement strategies. Feld is recognized for his ability to work efficiently in cross-functional teams and has previously led multiple long-term SaaS initiatives.

data.title: CPSC's New Federal Water Beads Safety Standard Takes Effect to Protect Children from Deadly Hazard
data.description: On March 12, 2026, the U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission introduced a new Federal Safety Standard for Water Beads, which has come into effect. As per the announcement, water beads produced post this date are required to adhere to the updated federal guidelines concerning performance, labeling, and testing to ensure consumer safety. This measure aims to enhance the regulation of water beads in the market, safeguarding consumers from potential risks associated with these products.
